summary_en: ¥16.50/share interim dividend (FY3/27, record date 31 Mar 2026) + ¥16.50/share year-end (vs. ¥15.00 each previously). Annual FY3/27 dividend raised to ¥33.00/share from ¥30.00/share. Driven by upward FY3/27 earnings revision: consolidated net income +12.9% to ¥1,050M on improved margins from product mix and procurement savings.
title_en: Notice of Correction of FY3/27 Consolidated Earnings Forecast and Interim Dividend (Surplus Distribution), and Revision of Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, Shobido Corporation announced an upward revision to its FY3/27 (year ending 30 Sept 2026) consolidated earnings forecast and concurrent increase to interim and year-end dividend guidance. The board approved an interim dividend of ¥16.50/share (record date 31 Mar 2026, payable 5 June 2026) and raised the full-year FY3/27 dividend forecast to ¥33.00/share, comprised of ¥16.50/share interim plus ¥16.50/share year-end, up from prior guidance of ¥15.00/share for each period (¥30.00 annual). The increase reflects an upward revision of consolidated net income to ¥1,050M (previously ¥930M, +12.9%), driven by higher selling prices on branded (NB) products, successful procurement-cost reduction on certain private-label items, and strong contribution from Picomonte Japan (consolidated since Q2 FY3/26). The company states that dividend policy prioritizes stable, continuous shareholder returns while preserving internal reserves for business expansion.
